roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PEOPLE'S OPP TO DEFT'S MTS EVID FILED
DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANYRESTITUTION, STAY AWAY ORDER, FINES & FEES RESULTING FROM THIS CASE MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN 13026168,/CTORD:PROBATION IN #13010716 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
/CAL:ADD TO CALENDAR TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT - FTA TO SET DA MTR/BWR:08-27-13/BWR1/CTORD:O,R, REINSTATED WITH THE SAME SPR REQUIREMENTS/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON DA MTR/DOP/

/CAL:SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:SPR RELEASE IS DENIED,/OR/CTORD:AS A FURTHER CONDITION OF RELEASE DEFENDANT SHALL CHECK IN WITH SPR TWICE PER WEEK INPERSON AND ONCE PER WEEK BY PHONE/CONTD:TO SET DA MTR/DOP/

/CAL:1203,2(A)PC MOTION/PD/WIAMTR/PROB ADM REV/MTR-DA/X:(THIS DISPOSITION WAS REACHED OVER THE OBJECTION OF THE ADA,)/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REINORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:3 DAYS/ADDL CTS:3/RX/X:DRUGS AND MONIES SEIZED DURINGVIOLATION ARE FORFEITED,/PROB EXT:11-01-16/4019HALF/
/TWS/CH2 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ  16D  /CTS 16   /WS/VF2 140/PROBREVFN/COA0/ICNA/BKFEE/COLLECT/SAORD/SA2:15TH AT VALENCIA ST, SF/SAORD3/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/

/CAL PRELIM HRG & MTS/X SUB, CAD RELEASED TO DEFENSE/AMEND 2, HS 11377(A)A MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEAOF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 05-03-13/987,2/BAIL: 30000/CONTD: SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 04-24-13/ /CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 05-02-13/DOP/
/CAL: DA MTR FILING/CONTD TS DA MTR/WIAMTR/S09/TBH:13026168/PROB ADM REV/SHER/BAIL:50000/CONTD:TO SET DA MTR/
/CAL:TO SET DA MTR/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:25,000/BWNUM:1ST/X: 2 OF 2 BENCHWARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE,/
/CAL:DA MTR FILING/CONTD TS DA MTR/WIAMTR/S12/TBH:13020695/PROB ADM REV/SHER/BAIL:5,000/
/CAL:SPR ELIG REPORT/LD:05-03-13/X:SPR IS DENIED/X:PRELIM HRG IS CONFIRMED/
